title: Anyone have an opinion about Audium? : r/sanfrancisco - Reddit
content: I really like Audium! I've been a few times with different people, and I think it's a very chill experience. Definitely worth it, not expensive.

title: Audium - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 (with Reviews)
content: Most attendees are local. This sound experiment has been around SF since the 60's, evolving and keeping true to its original intent. Price is reasonable.
